verdicts.reasoning: The dark-oak hull, fence edge, and compact wool sail make the pirate-ship task immediately legible.
verdicts.comment: Your ship structure has a strong hull and a clear sail. Consider adding a tiny cabin doorway for one more story detail next.

verdicts.comment: Your bright sail gives the ship a bold recognizable silhouette. Keep experimenting with colorful flag details next.

verdicts.comment: Your ship design has a sturdy hull and welcoming deck. Add a tiny treasure-room doorway next.
